subject: Company Law
module: Charges, Securities and Retention of Title

lessons.title: Fixed and Floating Charges — Definitions, Registration, and Priority
lessons.description: A charge is, in essence, an agreement that certain property will be available to satisfy a debt in the event that the borrower defaults.

lessons.title: Fixed versus Floating Charges and Crystallisation
lessons.description: The causes of crystallisation of a floating charge have been examined in March 2024, March 2021, March 2020, March 2019, and March 2018. If you are sitting the exam, you need to know this material cold.

lessons.title: Retention of Title Clauses
lessons.description: Retention of title — often abbreviated to ROT — is one of those topics that appears on the FE-1 almost exclusively as a problem question.
